hero.sub1: Turn your AI实战 experience into reusable skill cards
hero.value: Every problem you solve is valuable experience. Submit your experience, and the AI learns automatically. The next person facing the same issue—their AI will know too.

whatIs.title: What is an Experience Card
whatIs.analogy1: A doctor publishes a new treatment in a top journal
whatIs.analogy2: All doctors automatically learn through continuing education
whatIs.system1: You hit a problem in practice and find a solution
whatIs.system3: All users' AI learns automatically—you don't need to teach it again
whatIs.vp1Body: A problem that took you 2 hours to solve, submitted as structured experience in 5 minutes. The next person with the same issue—their AI already knows.
whatIs.vp2Body: Traditional approach is hand-holding. Now you just submit an experience card and every user's AI learns simultaneously—100x efficiency.
whatIs.vp3Title: The More You Share, The Stronger It Gets
whatIs.vp3Body: More community-contributed experience means stronger network effects. Every participant is both beneficiary and contributor.

list.label: Network Effect of Experience
list.desc: One person's hard-won experience, shared in structured form, helps all users' AI improve. Every submission makes the network stronger.

list.label: AI Auto-Learning
list.desc: Submitted experiences are automatically converted into executable prompt configurations and injected into AI decision-making—no manual intervention needed.

list.label: Confidence System
list.desc: Every recommendation has a confidence score. AI knows when to be confident and when to be conservative. Users have a reference too.

list.label: Community Co-Building
list.desc: Open source, transparent, verifiable. Everyone can contribute experience, and anyone can question or correct. Quality guaranteed by collective intelligence.

howItWorks.title: Three Simple Steps to Teach AI New Skills

steps.title: Submit Experience
steps.desc: Describe the problem scenario you encountered and how you solved it—natural language is fine.

steps.title: AI Auto-Structures
steps.desc: The system automatically converts your experience into a standardized Experience Card (YAML format).

steps.title: Network-Wide Sync
steps.desc: Experience cards are distributed to all users via Skill. AI automatically invokes them when similar problems arise.

install.title: Install Skill in One Click
install.desc: After installation, your AI will automatically learn all experience cards contributed by the community—no extra configuration needed.

steps.title: Open Terminal
steps.desc: Make sure OpenClaw is installed and running.

steps.title: Run Install Command
steps.desc: Copy the command below and paste it into the terminal.

steps.title: Start Using
steps.desc: After installation, AI automatically invokes experience cards when encountering relevant scenarios.

about.title: About the Project
about.p1: AILab (爪智能体实验室) is an experimental project exploring how AI Agents can quickly accumulate practical experience through community collaboration.
about.p2: We believe: experience should not be recreated. Every pitfall someone has encountered should become AI knowledge, benefiting all who come after.
about.p3:
Beta
Project is in early stage. Community contributions and discussions welcome.

footerCta.title: Ready to make your AI smarter?
footerCta.desc: Join the community and build the AI experience network together

footer.tagline: AILab · AI Agent Experience Hub · Making AI smarter over time
